title: Blind Al
content:
{{MarvelLegacy|Fox|[[Earth-10005]]|4=Characters|6=''Deadpool'' or ''Deadpool 2''}} {{Character |image = Blind Al.png |real name = Althea{{Ref|DW}} |alias = {{Alias |nicknames = Blind Al{{Ref|DW}}}} |species = [[Human]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|USA}} |gender = Female |movie = ''[[Deadpool & Wolverine]]'' |actor = [[Leslie Uggams]] |status = Alive}} {{Quote|That's her name, you call her Blind Al?"
"Well she's blind.|[[Wolverine]] and [[Deadpool]]|Deadpool & Wolverine}} '''Althea''' is a friend and roommate of [[Wade Wilson]] who goes by the nickname '''Blind Al'''. ==Biography== {{MD|Althea (Earth-10005 Revised)||1}} ===Deadpool's Roommate=== ====Meeting Wade Wilson==== {{Quote|I pray every day that fire finds your body and finishes the job God didn't have the nuts to do.|Blind Al and [[Wade Wilson]]|Deadpool & Wolverine}} Althea met and became roommates with [[Wade Wilson]], who refers to her as Blind Al. Wilson moved out to live with his girlfriend, [[Vanessa Carlysle]], but when they broke up, Wilson moved back in with Blind Al.{{Ref|DW}} ====Wade Wilson's Birthday==== {{Quote|Want to do some cocaine?"
"Hey! Cocaine is the one thing [[Kevin Feige|Feige]] said is off limits.|Blind Al and [[Wade Wilson]]|Deadpool & Wolverine}} [[File:Wanna Do Some Cocaine.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Blind Al asks [[Wade Wilson]] about cocaine]] In [[2020s/Earth-10005#2024|2024]], Blind Al attended [[Wade Wilson]]'s surprise birthday party at their [[Wade Wilson's Apartment|apartment]] along with Wilson's other friends. The group surprised Wilson when he returned home before all the guests began mingling with each other. Wilson sat down with Blind Al, who asked him about when he would be able to pay the rent. When Wilson joked about inadvertently killing Blind Al, she remarked that she hoped that he would die by fire. Blind Al then asked if Wilson wanted to do cocaine with her, but he answered that they were not allowed. All the guests listened to Wilson make a speech about how grateful he was to have them in his life.{{Ref|DW}} ====New Friends==== [[File:Blind Al's reaction to Dogpool.png|{{AltFloat}}|Blind Al meets [[Wolverine]] and [[Dogpool]]]] {{Quote|Althea, this is... this is Logan."
"Nice to meet you, Logan."
"Nice to meet you, too.|[[Deadpool]], Blind Al, and [[Wolverine]]|Deadpool & Wolverine}} A few days later, Blind Al overheard commotion outside, so she approached the window and listened to the sounds of [[Deadpool]] and [[Wolverine]] violently fighting against the entire [[Deadpool Corps]]. Blind Al was bothered by the fighting and wished that she had been rendered unable to hear instead. Afterwards, Deadpool returned to their [[Wade Wilson's Apartment|apartment]] and introduced Blind Al to Wolverine and [[Dogpool]]. Deadpool told Blind Al to pat Dogpool, making her freak out after accidentally touching Dogpool's tongue. Later on, all of Wilson's friends gathered together again at their apartment for dinner.{{Ref|DW}} ==Facilities== *'''[[Wade Wilson's Apartment]]''': Blind Al resides in an apartment in [[New York City]] with [[Wade Wilson]]. ==Relationships== ===Allies=== *[[Deadpool|Wade Wilson/Deadpool]] - Friend and Roommate *[[Vanessa Carlysle]] *[[Dopinder]] *[[X-Men/Earth-10005|X-Men]] **[[Colossus|Piotr Rasputin/Colossus]] **[[Negasonic Teenage Warhead|Ellie Phimister/Negasonic Teenage Warhead]] **[[Yukio]] *[[Peter Wisdom]] *[[Shatterstar|Rusty/Shatterstar]] *[[Buck]] *[[Wolverine|Logan/Wolverine]] *[[Dogpool|Mary Puppins/Dogpool]] *[[X-23|X-23/Laura]] ==Trivia== *In the comics, Blind Al is a Caucasian British woman who was the hostage turned roommate of [[Deadpool]], with whom she has a love-hate relationship. *In {{WPS|20th Century Fox}}'s {{WPS|X-Men (film series)|''X-Men'' film series}}, Blind Al is the roommate of [[Wade Wilson]] who is often disgusted by Wilson's acts due to having no context of the sight of what is happening. She was the one who recommended [[Deadpool Suit|Deadpool’s suit]] to be red. ==Behind the Scenes== *Blind Al in the [[Marvel Cinematic Universe]] continues the live-action incarnation of the character from {{WPS|20th Century Fox}}'s {{WPS|X-Men (film series)|''X-Men'' film series}}, who was portrayed by [[Leslie Uggams]]. *The character was mistakenly dubbed as Big Al in ''[[Deadpool & Wolverine]]'' "Everyone" TV Spot on the [https://www.youtube.com/@marvel/featured Marvel Entertainment YouTube Channel]. ==References== {{Gallery|Blind Al/Gallery}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} *{{Marvel|Althea (Earth-10005 Revised)}} *{{WP}} [[es:Althea]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Deadpool & Wolverine Characters]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Gray Hair]] [[Category:Brown Eyes]]
